basic_details.job_title: Konkan Railway Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Section Officer, Personnel Inspector and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) has officially released the Various Posts Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. CO/P-R/9C/2026) for 9 vacancies across India. Eligible CA/CMA qualified candidates, engineering graduates, commerce graduates, diploma holders, and HR/Labour Law professionals aged 30 to 40 years can attend the walk-in interview on 22 June 2026 through the KRCL recruitment process. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly consolidated remuneration ranging from ₹41,380 to ₹76,660.

age_limit.details: Assistant Financial Advisor: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Assistant Materials Manager: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Section Officer: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Depot Materials Superintendent: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Personnel Inspector: Maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified CA/CMA, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, B.Com, M.Com, Inter CA/CMA, Diploma/Degree in Labour Laws or equivalent.
qualification.details: Assistant Financial Advisor: Qualified CA/ CMA Assistant Materials Manager: Bachelor's Degree of Engineering in Mechanical / Civil / Electrical / Electronics or its equivalent with minimum 60% marks. Additional qualification from PGDMM/MBA in Material Management or M.Tech is preferred. Three years post qualification experience in Materials Management in an Industrial/ Commercial / Govt. Undertaking. Section Officer: B.Com with 7 years experience OR M.Com with 4 years experience OR Inter CA/CMA with 2 years experience. Depot Materials Superintendent: Bachelor's Degree or Diploma of Engineering in Mechanical / Civil / Electrical / Electronics or its equivalent with minimum 60% marks. Additional qualification from PGDMM/MBA in Material Management is preferred. Personnel Inspector: Diploma / Degree from UGC approved Universities/Institution in Labour Laws or any graduate with PG Diploma in Personnel Management / MBA with Personnel Management specialization / MBA in HR / PG Diploma in Human Resource Management.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated Remuneration ranges from Rs. 41380 to Rs. 76660 per month.

selection_process: Walk-in interview Group Discussion (GD) or any other elimination round like written test
etc. (if applicable) Interview by a nominated Committee

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview dates are scheduled for June 22 and 23, 2026. Candidates should report on these dates for the interview.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the KRCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) has announced a total of 9 vacancies for various contract posts. These include positions like Assistant Financial Advisor, Assistant Materials Manager, and others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the KRCL posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. They range from CA/CMA, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, B.Com, M.Com, Inter CA/CMA, to Diploma/Degree in Labour Laws or equivalent, depending on the specific role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the KRCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the posts ranges from 30 to 40 years. Specific age limits are mentioned for each post in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the KRCL contract posts?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration for the contract posts ranges from Rs. 41,380 to Rs. 76,660 per month, along with basic pay, DA, and other allowances as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this KRCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear directly for the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview for KRCL recruitment be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400614. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, one copy of the application in the prescribed format, and one set of self-attested photocopies of all required certificates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the KRCL recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contract. Candidates will be hired on a contractual basis by Konkan Railway Corporation Limited.
